summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Post-Absorption VWAP Reversal Engine V1. All CLI commands (validate, backtest, plateau, report) work correctly. Pytest suite passes 11/11 tests. No lookahead bias detected. Pine script includes all required elements. Synthetic data correctly returns INSUFFICIENT_DATA as expected.
passed_tests: Project structure verification - all required modules present
CLI validate command - returns INSUFFICIENT_DATA with 14 directional absorption trades
CLI backtest command - returns INSUFFICIENT_DATA with negative expectancy on synthetic data
CLI plateau command - tests 5,120 parameter combinations, returns NO_STABLE_PLATEAU
CLI report command - displays latest report summary
Report generation - JSON/MD/CSV/HTML files created correctly
No lookahead bias - label columns excluded from features, verified by assert_no_label_leakage
Pine script structure - includes v6, confirmed-bar logic, session VWAP, markers, alerts, paper strategy, debug table
Pine script safety - no live execution/webhook/broker logic found
Data loader - supports configurable column mapping (timestamp/ts_event/date+time variants)
VWAP calculation - resets by session, handles zero-volume bars with carry_forward policy
Absorption features - high volume + low displacement detection works correctly
Labels generation - forward-looking labels computed from future bars only
Baseline comparisons - 6 baselines tested (absorption_vwap, high_volume_only, low_displacement_only, vwap_fade_no_absorption, rsi_reversal, random_direction_on_absorption)
Walk-forward validation - fold metrics generated correctly
